title: cynometra steenisii
intro: Cynometra steenisii, also known as the Steenis' tower tree, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds which are used to treat various health conditions. The seeds of Cynometra steenisii are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. The seeds can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, to harness their medicinal benefits.
